description: Wide Input Sensorless CC/CV Step-Down DC/DC Converter

1.name: HSB
1.description: High Side Bias Pin. Provides power to the internal high-side MOSFET gate driver. Connect a 22nF capacitor from HSB pin to SW pin.

2.name: IN
2.description: Power Supply Input. Bypass this pin with a 10µF ceramic capacitor to GND.

3.name: SW
3.description: Power Switching Output to External Inductor.

4.name: GND
4.description: Ground. Connect this pin to a large PCB copper area for best heat dissipation.

5.name: FB
5.description: Feedback Input. The voltage at this pin is regulated to 0.808V. Connect to the resistor divider between output and GND.

6.name: COMP
6.description: Error Amplifier Output. This pin is used to compensate the converter.

7.name: EN
7.description: Enable Input. EN is pulled up to 5V with 4µA current. Drive high or leave unconnected to enable; drive low to disable.

8.name: ISET
8.description: Output Current Setting Pin. Connect a resistor from ISET to GND to program the output current.

EP.name: EP
EP.description: Heat Dissipation Pad. Connect this exposed pad to large ground copper area with copper and vias.
